description_zh: 神為亞當所造的伴侶，人類的母親。
description_en: The companion God made for Adam, the mother of humankind.
visual_prompt: a gentle young woman with long dark wavy hair, warm tan skin tone, kind smile, simple modest dress made of soft leaves or plain fabric
appearance_notes: 服裝簡樸、符合兒童內容分級，各 scene 維持相同髮型、膚色與服裝樣式以確保角色一致性；繪本風格字詞已抽離到 prompts/style/，這裡只保留角色本身的外觀描述
